entity.label: Ishmaiah
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Son of Obadiah, and viceroy of Zebulun under David and Solomon (1 Chr. 27:19).

nodes.label: Obadiah
nodes.description: A prince of Zebulun in the time of David (1 Chr. 27:19).

verses.text: Of Zebulun, Ishmaiah the son of Obadiah: of Naphtali, Jerimoth the son of Azriel:
